chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-7511 of 2022 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1.For hearing of CMA No.31829/2022 2.For hearing of main case. 05.03.2025 Mr.Qazi Umair Ali, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr.Irfan Mir Halepota, Advocate for the Respondent (F.B.R) Mr.Kashif Nazeer, Assistant Attorney General. Per learned counsel for the petitioner, the matter pertains to show cause notices and it is the contention of the petitioner that the same are unwarranted inter alia being time barred. Be that as it may, it is contended that the petitioner shall contest the notices before the issuing authority and the same may be directed to adjudicate vide a speaking order after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner. It is further sought that pending the aforesaid no coercive action shall be taken against the petitioner. Learned counsel for the Department articulates no cavil to the aforesaid and states that the petition may be disposed of in the above terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge nasir
